title: KDNA Route Result
description: The output of kdna route <task> --json. Defines whether, which, and how a KDNA domain should be loaded for a given task.

status.description: The routing state. Determined by the Router's 5-gate pipeline (Intent → Negative → Fit → Trust → Ambiguity).

action.description: The action the Agent must execute. skip = answer normally without KDNA. load = load the selected domain. ask = present choice to user. block = stop (trust/policy violation).

needs_kdna.description: Whether the task could benefit from domain judgment. True even when no local domain is available — this distinguishes 'task doesn't need KDNA' from 'task could use KDNA but none installed.'

selected_domain.description: The domain to load. Present only when action is 'load'. Format: @scope/name.

reason.description: Human-readable explanation of the routing decision. Suitable for trace logs and developer debugging.

confidence.description: Router's confidence in the match. Only meaningful when status is LOAD_STRONG_FIT or SKIP_WEAK_FIT.

candidates.description: All installed domains evaluated against the task.

decision.description: Per-domain routing decision. 'rejected' = excluded by does_not_apply_when or semantic mismatch. 'weak_match' = partial relevance below confidence threshold. 'strong_match' = high-confidence fit. 'ambiguous' = could apply but conflicts with another domain.

reason.description: Why this decision was made. For rejected: which exclusion triggered. For weak_match: what was insufficient.

matched_does_not_apply_when.description: If rejected by negative match: the specific does_not_apply_when entry that excluded this domain.

matched_applies_when.description: If matched: the specific applies_when entry that triggered the match.

rejected_domains.description: Domains explicitly rejected by does_not_apply_when. Separated for audit clarity.

trust.description: Trust verification results. Only populated when a domain is a candidate for loading.

failures.description: List of trust checks that failed, if any.

ambiguity.description: Present only when status is ASK_AMBIGUOUS_DOMAIN.

domains.description: The 2+ domains that could apply but with different judgment frames.

recommendation.description: Router's recommendation to the user, if any.

registry_suggestions.description: Domains available in the registry that could help, but are not installed. Present only when status is SKIP_NO_LOCAL_DOMAIN and discovery is enabled. The Agent MUST NOT auto-install these.

auto_install.description: Always false. KDNA never auto-installs domains. This field exists to make the policy explicit in every route result.

trace_id.description: Unique identifier for this routing decision. Used for audit and trace replay.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the route was evaluated.
